title: Quad Green renovations will create an outdoor destination for students
summary_en: Renovations to Quad Green will turn the space between the College of Pharmacy Building and Hillcrest Residence Hall into an area for relaxation and recreation. The area will feature a pavilion with outdoor furniture, two pickleball courts, a basketball court, and new sidewalks.
title_cn: 四方绿地改造项目将为学生打造户外活动目的地
